Promo FIGHT VAULT
Promo FIGHT VAULT

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04

Video.summary: See how fighting has impacted Jeremy Perdue's life and how he has to balance life and fighting. Does Jeremy's training pay off in the end against Chris Robinson....Find out in this episode!
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue
Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue
Out of the Cage - Jeremy Perdue

Video.summary: Chad Anheliger is well rounded in most fight sports but has been having issues with hip flexibility and a long-term shoulder injury. After some time with Sports Conditioning coach Marie Michalski, he learns valuable skills to make him a stronger fighter.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Chad Anheliger
Video.title: After The Fight - Chad Anheliger

Image.alt: After The Fight - Chad Anheliger
After The Fight - Chad Anheliger
After The Fight - Chad Anheliger

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 28 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Video.summary: Motivated by watching UFC fights, Shawn Fitzsimmons was eager to start training in MMA. After a stint teaching self defense classes in Europe, Shawn is ready to prove his skills in the cage. As the main event at HK37, he takes on Ryan Dickson in the Lightweight division.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Image.alt: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Video.summary: How does one begin to return to their sport after an injury? After the Fight looks at the physical and mental struggles of fighters after a fight and how they begin to recover. Featuring Chris Smeltzer

Video.title: After The Fight - Chris Smeltzer

Image.alt: After The Fight - Chris Smeltzer

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
Out of the Cage - Nick Burnham
